# Drama character

👥 Characters: Adelle (../Characters/Adelle%202ff1980fd10b42a7bc0f65b61a2ab3e8.md), Drenodir (../Characters/Drenodir%20940bfbf595f74f91ad51de93d77ffd66.md), George (../Characters/George%20e22279389f1e493abd308e948d47a2e8.md), James (../Characters/James%2014f6a0f77a694f4cb18881bb58846c94.md), Lord Mediev (../Characters/Lord%20Mediev%201b19d49697be4210828da0f74c16f8e9.md), Lady Mediev (../Characters/Lady%20Mediev%20b210b5db3ef945b0834c2600d3838dca.md), Millamer (../Characters/Millamer%20b9feb3f85e784020a074f460918e85b7.md), Nivana (../Characters/Nivana%20a2ee9cd0a28b4945af74fd3022fd97af.md), The Innkeeper (../Characters/The%20Innkeeper%20833b88c98a2141df8a66e0341682d98c.md), The Matron (../Characters/The%20Matron%20b0f3c553544944f48857e06b95ed57af.md), The Merchant of Sorcerers (../Characters/The%20Merchant%20of%20Sorcerers%20c48080a70bbb443a8eba9c60d24bd331.md), The Nurse (../Characters/The%20Nurse%20ae7cf88e2f574b81aa0e515dc0b8a1e5.md), Jewel (../Characters/Jewel%2020f58e628ba2804dae2ceb19a9717da5.md)

A drama character is a character whose emotions and desires play an important part in the user experience.

The psyche of a drama character is fair game to be delved into and explored.

<aside>
💡

Drama characters should have well defined motivations.

</aside>

Drama characters should be sympathetic.
